text:
Market today: Mixed sentiment for tech. While the SK Hynix debut boosts chip sector confidence, there are underlying fears about AI and data center growth. This directly impacts your concentrated portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL (-26.52%) and SPAL (-25.17%) are deep in the red; their leveraged nature and margin trading amplify these drops. PTNM (-15.25%) is also a concern as a speculative play with a notable loss.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions, SOXL and SPAL, for further decay. Monitor broader chip sector sentiment following the SK Hynix news.

Bottom line: Prioritize managing your highly volatile, leveraged positions and stay vigilant on chip sector trends.
plays: Consider trimming SOXL (-26.52%) and SPAL (-25.17%) to reduce margin exposure and decay risk; respect their stops.
Watch your PTNM (-15.25%) spec play closely; its stop at 9.5 is critical to respect given its volatility.
If looking to add a new chip name, AVGO (scanner entry 398.26-397.12, stop 394.68) is on watch and shows good value.
